zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth De Montfort於1122年11月30日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利時，她的父親Amaury de Montfort II52歲，母親Agnes de Garlende28歲。她於1141年與Galeran Valeran de Beaumont結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1181年12月15日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯古內艾-素-馬內享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth De Montfort于1122年11月30日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利时，她的父亲Amaury de Montfort II52岁，母亲Agnes de Garlende28岁。她于1141年与Galeran Valeran de Beaumont结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1181年12月15日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯古內艾-素-馬內享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth De Montfort was born on 30 November 1122, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, her father, Amaury de Montfort II, was 52 and her mother, Agnes de Garlende, was 28. She married Galeran Valeran de Beaumont in 1141. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 15 December 1181, in Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth De Montfort est née le 30 novembre 1122, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Amaury de Montfort II, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Garlende, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Galeran Valeran de Beaumont en 1141. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 décembre 1181, à Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth De Montfort am 30. November 1122 in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Amaury de Montfort II 52 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Garlende 28. Sie hat 1141 Galeran Valeran de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Dezember 1181 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth De Montfort è nata il il 30 novembre 1122 nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Amaury de Montfort II, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Garlende, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Galeran Valeran de Beaumont nel 1141. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 dicembre 1181, nel Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Montfortが1122年11月30日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーで生まれた時，父Amaury de Montfort IIは52歳，母Agnes de Garlendeは28歳であった。1141年にGaleran Valeran de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1181年12月15日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスゴウルナイ-スル-マルンで59歳で死去した。

ko.Préaux, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Franc: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 플e오스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Montfort(이)가 1122년 11월 30일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Amaury de Montfort II(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Garlende(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1141년 Galeran Valeran de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1181년 12월 15일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스 고우른아이-수-마니에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Galeran Valeran de Beaumont em 1141. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Préaux, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Franc: прeаукс, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth De Montfort родилась 30 ноября 1122 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Amaury de Montfort II было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Garlende, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Galeran Valeran de Beaumont в 1141 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 15 декабря 1181 г. в местности гоурнеи-сур-марн, сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

Se casó con Galeran Valeran de Beaumont en 1141. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas.
